description_long: This yacht features a modern, boxy superstructure with a flat, overhanging roof and a large open deck area below. The hull is rectangular and sits atop a flat, light-colored platform, suggesting a pontoon or houseboat-style design. Two ladders are visible on opposite sides, providing access between the deck and the platform below. The upper deck includes a recessed area, possibly for seating or sunbathing, and a small raised section that may serve as a helm or observation point. The yacht's exterior is finished in a combination of white and light wood tones, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. There are no visible windows or doors, and the design emphasizes open, accessible spaces.
description: A modern, boxy yacht with a flat roof, open deck, and light wood accents, featuring ladders for access and a recessed upper area.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat roof, open deck, and a ladder leading up from the platform, with the recessed area on the upper deck visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the overhanging roof, the open space beneath, and the side ladder, with the raised section on the upper deck more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back ladder, the open deck area, and the flat, rectangular hull, with the recessed upper area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the side ladder, the open deck, and the raised section on the upper deck, with the flat roof extending outward.
attribute_hull_design: Rectangular, flat-bottom hull with no visible keels or chines, finished in white with clean, straight lines and no visible markings.
attribute_deck_layout: Two main levels: an open lower deck with ladders on both sides and a flat, overhanging upper deck with a recessed area and a small raised section, no visible railings or deck equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No enclosed cabins are visible; the structure consists of an open deck with a flat roof and a small raised section, lacking windows or doors.
